description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a single-cutaway design, featuring a light cream or butterscotch finish on the body and a black pickguard. The neck is made of a lighter wood, likely maple, with a matching fingerboard and dot inlays. The hardware includes a chrome bridge, two single-coil pickups, and a control plate with a switch and two knobs. The headstock is classic and slightly squared, with six inline tuning pegs and a visible string tree. A black guitar strap is attached to the body, hanging loosely. The back of the guitar is plain, with a visible neck plate and no rear cavity covers.
description: A cream-colored, single-cutaway electric guitar with a black pickguard, chrome hardware, and a maple neck. It features two single-coil pickups and a classic headstock with six inline tuners.
description_view_0: The guitar is seen from the side, showing the slim profile of the body and neck, with the strap hanging down.
description_view_1: The front view displays the cream body, black pickguard, chrome bridge, two single-coil pickups, and the control plate with knobs and switch.
description_view_2: The opposite side profile highlights the thinness of the guitar and the contour of the body and neck.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals the plain back, neck plate, and the attached strap, with no visible electronics covers.
attribute_headstock_design: Classic Fender Telecaster shape with six inline tuning pegs and a visible string tree
